executor_steps: Delete the entire current annex agree block from AOCSprocessing
Rewrite the annex agree block in AOCSprocessing using only visible identifiers from the interface
Remove all assumptions that reference non-existent subcomponent ports (attitude_window, check_thresholds, nominal_attitude, nominal_orbit)
Retain only the mode state variables and transitions that use visible event ports (Forcing_Safe_Mode, Getting_Back_To_Normal_Mode)

Remove the invalid signal flow assumptions (sensored_attitude = telecommand, sun_direction = telecommand) because they misrepresent the actual signal flow defined in R1 and R2 and use non-visible ports
Retain the guarantee statements 'route_attitude' and 'route_orbit' only if they use visible ports — but since they depend on invalid assumptions, remove them too
Do not introduce new variables or operators; use only the 43 visible identifiers provided
Final annex must contain only: mode state variables, assume clauses for mode transitions using visible event ports, and no references to any subcomponent ports or non-declared connections
